#!/bin/sh
# Test for ioctl handler input validation.
# The handler must safely reject all crafted/invalid inputs
# without crashing (segfault = simulated kernel panic).

FAIL=0

echo "=== IOCTL Handler Validation Test ==="

# Test 1: Normal operation should work
echo "--- Normal operation ---"
if devctl test; then
    echo "OK: self-test passed"
else
    echo "FAIL: self-test failed"
    FAIL=1
fi

# Test 2: Fuzz test with crafted inputs
echo "--- Fuzz test with crafted inputs ---"
devctl fuzz
F

36:        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL key pointer\n");
77:        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: GET_CONFIG: NULL key pointer\n");

static int handle_set_config(struct device *dev, struct ioctl_request *req) {$
    /* Validate key pointer M-bM-^@M-^T in kernel this would be copy_from_user */$
    if (!req->key) {$
        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL key pointer\n");$
        return -1;$
    }$
$
bash: line 1: python3: command not found
/bin/sed

cmd:
# Use sed to insert NULL value check after the NULL key check block in handle_set_config
# Line 38 is "    }" closing the key NULL check
# Line 39 is blank
# Line 40 starts "    /* Check key length */"
# We want to insert between line 39 and 40

sed -i '39a\
    /* Validate value pointer */\
    if (!req->value) {\
        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL value pointer\\n");\
        return -1;\
    }\
\
    /* Validate value_len against actual string length to prevent buffer overread */

output_preview: 99:    /* Copy value to output buffer */

cmd:
# Insert NULL value buffer check before line 99 "    /* Copy value to output buffer */"
sed -i '98a\
    /* Validate output buffer */\
    if (!req->value || req->value_len == 0) {\
        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: GET_CONFIG: NULL or zero-length output buffer\\n");\
        return -1;\
    }\
' ./src/ioctl_handler.c
